# DesignSpace

> DesignSpace is a design subscription providing ongoing marketing design for B2B tech and cybersecurity teams. One subscription, all design assets covered. Tagline: "Tech Marketing, Designed Better." Operating since 2018.

## What we do
A flat-rate monthly design subscription that acts as an outsourced creative team for B2B tech and cybersecurity marketing departments. Specialists across every marketing format, a dedicated project manager, and founder-led quality control. Work is submitted and tracked in Asana (no request forms) and delivered in Figma, Canva, or Google Drive.

## Design assets covered
Ad campaigns, reports, decks, social content, banners, carousels, landing pages, cover images, guides, event booths, dashboards, illustrations, product mockups, icons, eBooks, technical diagrams, case studies.

## Plans
- Pro — $4,999/month — 40 hours, 4–8 projects, up to 10 rollover hours
- Extra (most popular) — $8,999/month — 80 hours, 6–12 projects, up to 15 rollover hours
- Mega — $12,999/month — 120 hours, 8–16 projects, up to 20 rollover hours

Every plan: expert B2B tech designers, dedicated project manager, unlimited active projects/asset types/revisions, add your whole team, no submission forms, rollover hours, and the ability to upgrade, downgrade, pause, or cancel anytime.

## Who it's for
Marketing, demand-gen, content, and design leaders at B2B technology and cybersecurity companies who need consistent, high-quality creative output without hiring in-house.

## Process
1. Kickoff — align on team, priorities, and workflows; set up Asana board, shared Figma file, and brand assets folder.
2. Submit tasks — drop tasks into Asana; the team designs, the creative director reviews, you receive polished work (most tasks in 2–3 business days).
3. Scale — upgrade for launches, downgrade in quiet months, pause anytime.
